verbGlossary.APPROVES SPEC OF: {target} reviews and accepts {source} specification or shop drawing before the target material may be procured and installed on site.
verbGlossary.APPROVES WORK BY: {source} must sign off on {target} installation scope, confirming code compliance before the system is placed in service.
verbGlossary.ASSIGNS: {source} mandates the deployment of {target} or quality resource to the project for the duration of covered work.
verbGlossary.AUTHORIZES: {source} issuance grants legal permission for {target} (trade crew or equipment) to begin work on the regulated scope.
verbGlossary.CERTIFIES WAGES OF: {source}requirement mandates verified payroll records for {target}, confirming correct wage rates and benefits.
verbGlossary.CONSTRAINS USE OF: {source} permit imposes operational limits (hours, vibration, runoff controls) on {target} during permitted activities.
verbGlossary.COORDINATES STANDBY OF: Inspection scheduling requires {target} to remain on standby or repositioned so the inspector can observe concealed or elevated work.
verbGlossary.DISPATCHES: {source} requirement triggers deployment of {target} or testing resource to the jobsite for a witnessed inspection event.
verbGlossary.ENGAGES: {source} or code requirement mandates the hiring or contracting of {target} to perform independent verification or commissioning.
verbGlossary.GOVERNS OPERATION OF: {source}plan establishes specific operational protocols, exclusion zones, and daily inspection requirements for {target}.
verbGlossary.IDLES: {target} hold forces {source} (equipment or crew) to stand idle on site, incurring cost without production until the hold is lifted.
verbGlossary.LICENSES: {source}-specific permit requires {target} worker to hold a valid license or journeyman card before performing permitted work on the project.
verbGlossary.MEASURED BY: {source} metric is calculated based on the performance or output of {target} (e.g., inspection pass rate measured by QC inspector results).
verbGlossary.MOBILIZES: {source} notification or filing triggers the initial mobilization of {target} to the project site.
verbGlossary.REQUIRES INSTALLATION OF: {source} certificate cannot be issued until {target} is fully installed and operational, as confirmed by inspection.
verbGlossary.REQUIRES SIGN-OFF FROM: {source} certificate issuance depends on a formal written approval or commissioning report from {target}.
verbGlossary.RESTRICTS OPERATION OF: {source}limits when, where, or how {target} may operate (e.g., wetland buffers, noise curfews, emission controls).
verbGlossary.TRIGGERS DEPLOYMENT OF: {source} issuance initiates the mobilization and setup of {target} on site for the newly authorized work scope.
verbGlossary.TRIGGERS LAYOUT BY: {source} issuance authorizes {target} control points, property-line offsets, and elevation benchmarks on site.
verbGlossary.VERIFIES INSTALLATION OF: {source} inspector checks that {target} or temporary system is properly installed and safe before authorizing continued construction.
verbGlossary.WITNESSES USE OF: {source}inspection requires {target} operation to be directly observed by a certified inspector during critical structural or testing activities.
